caption: The video features a static graphic set against a dark blue background with diagonal, translucent light streaks. Centered in the frame are several overlapping, translucent rectangles that create a layered glass effect. Within these layers, a stylized illustration depicts a white world map with blue and red circular nodes connected by thin lines, resembling a network. Below this imagery, white text is displayed on the screen. The first line reads "ST stands for" in a simple sans-serif font. Directly underneath, the phrase "life.augmented" appears in a larger, stylized lowercase typeface, where the word "life" is separated from "augmented" by a small blue dot. There are no people or movements present; the visual composition remains identical and frozen across the entire sequence, showing no changes in the positioning of the text, logos, or background elements.
